subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-25 in London
subcodes.first_line: The Baha'i Cause consists of the same principles inherent in all the divine religions.  'Now that the one hundred hath come, ninety is with us also.'
subcodes.first_line_orig: امر بهائی شامل اصول جمیع ادیانست چونکه صد آمد نود هم پیش ماست
subcodes.subjects: @universality of the Cause, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @oneness; unity of religion
